task: pick upthe yellow towel put on the another side of the table
raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS -** A yellow towel lies on a wooden table. A metal pot is on the left, and a red-handled tool is on the right. The towel is a soft, flexible object with a distinct shape. STRATEGY - First, grasp the towel at its body to ensure a secure hold. Then, transport it to the opposite side of the table, avoiding contact with other objects. Finally, place it gently on the target area. Failure modes include dropping the towel during transport or placing it incorrectly. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the towel at its body; Step 2 grasp the towel body for a secure hold; Step 3 transport the towel to the opposite side; Step 4 place the towel on the target area.

Goal: on(yellow_towel, table); stable(yellow_towel)
Scene: yellow_towel, table, metal_pot, red_tool
Step 1: reach(yellow_towel)
  affordance_region: the body of the yellow towel
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, yellow_towel, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, yellow_towel) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(yellow_towel)
  affordance_region: the body of the yellow towel
  contact: holding(yellow_towel) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(yellow_towel)
Step 3: transport(yellow_towel -> opposite_side_of_table)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the opposite side of the table
  spatial: above(yellow_towel, opposite_side_of_table, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(yellow_towel)
  done_when: above(yellow_towel, opposite_side_of_table, 0.05)
Step 4: place(yellow_towel -> opposite_side_of_table)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the opposite side of the table
  contact: surface_contact(yellow_towel, opposite_side_of_table) [completion]; released(yellow_towel) [completion]
  pose: stable(yellow_towel) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(yellow_towel, opposite_side_of_table) AND released(yellow_towel)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the yellow towel
the body of the yellow towel
an empty area on the opposite side of the table
an empty area on the opposite side of the table
